user.title: Ecowitt Public Share
user.description:
Enter the authorize code from your Ecowitt share URL.

Example: if your share URL is `https://www.ecowitt.net/home/share?authorize=D2H86Q`, enter `D2H86Q`.

error.invalid_authorize: The authorize code was not recognised. Please check it and try again.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to Ecowitt. Check your network connection.

abort.already_configured: This weather station is already configured.
